title: We Take Shipping Personally
content: We know the pain of receiving a cracked jewel case. It haunts us. We sandwich CDs between rigid cardboard stiffeners and use heavy-duty tubes for posters. Standard shipping takes 3-5 business days. International shipping depends on how angry the seagulls are over the Atlantic.

title: Do you really shake-test the CDs?
content: Yes. If we hear it rattle, we open it up and add a foam stopper. We take 'crush resistance' very seriously.

title: What is the 'Whelmed' era?
content: It's our current state of being. Not overwhelmed, not underwhelmed. Just... whelmed. Check out our 2025 album for details.

title: Can I return an item?
content: If it arrives damaged despite our paranoia-level packaging, absolutely. Contact us within 30 days.

title: Join the Chaos?
content: We are currently fully staffed by a small team of musicians and one very opinionated crow. However, we are always looking for Street Team Volunteers (Payment: Stickers and good vibes).
